markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content progress and discuss a new AI visibility experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Action Required:** Maya must prioritize \~100 article titles in the Airtable content calendar to unblock production.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**New Review Process:** A change-log format (struck-through text for old, blue for new) in Notion will streamline artifact feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Experiment:** GrowthX will scope a new site (e.g., `SOCInnovationDays.com`) to boost Daylight's AI presence and build an event email list.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [**Reporting:** Daylight is set up in GrowthX's new AI visibility tool (launching this week) to track LLM citations and bot traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

## Topics

### Content Calendar & Prioritization

  - [**Goal:** Prioritize \~100 article titles in the Airtable content calendar to unblock production.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Action:** Maya to assign `High`, `Medium`, or `Low` priority to each title.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This input will guide GrowthX in selecting the first 10 articles to draft.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Feedback:** Use Airtable comments for any topics to be removed.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)

### New Review Process

  - [**Format:** A change-log in Notion shows edits made in response to feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [**Old Text:** Struck-through](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
      - [**New Text:** In blue](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [**Case Studies:** Content will not include customer case studies until legal approval is secured.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This avoids publication delays; the internal team is aware of the restriction.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

### Reporting & AI Visibility

  - [**Performance Dashboard:** A new dashboard tracks organic traffic (impressions, clicks) and LLM referrals.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool:** Daylight is set up in GrowthX's new proprietary tool (launching this week).](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Track LLM citations for custom prompts and monitor bot traffic (e.g., ChatGPT bot).](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Bot traffic signals content being used for model training, a key indicator of brand influence.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [**AEO Audit:** A technical audit is in progress to score each page for "Answer Engine Optimization" (AEO) and will be reviewed next week.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

### AI Visibility Experiment: `SOCInnovationDays.com`

  - [**Proposal:** Launch a new, broader site (e.g., `SOCInnovationDays.com`) to boost Daylight's AI visibility and build an email list for an event series.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [**Model:** Based on a successful GrowthX experiment that influenced a client's AI presence from a zero-authority domain in 6 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [**Key Requirement:** A minimal review process is essential for rapid iteration and success.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [**Scope:** Content would cover all of security operations, not just Daylight's services.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Maya:**](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Prioritize \~100 article titles in the Airtable content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Review the four pending artifacts in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
      - [Send GrowthX keywords for the `SOCInnovationDays.com` experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
      - [Send the "alert fatigue" calibration article to Maya today.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
      - [Finalize setup of Daylight's account in the new AI visibility tool by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
      - [Scope the `SOCInnovationDays.com` experiment and present findings to Maya.](https://fathom.video/share/UbKygAbi4gFwe2a2_hnjxizS8rC541Xd?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
